ai_summary: Stephanie Beltran is a first-year graduate student in speech-language pathology with extensive experience working with children from newborns to age 17, including special needs and early intervention. She is seeking part-time work in Mesa/Chandler with availability on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Fridays until 2pm, and demonstrates strong child development knowledge with ABA training.
